name: Raspberry Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the cream cheese and sour cream using an electric mixer set at medium speed until smooth and fluffy.
2. Add sugar and eggs, blending well.
3. Pour mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Bake at 375°F for 35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Chill for at least 1 hour in the refrigerator.
6. Meanwhile, drain raspberries, reserving juice.
7. Blend cornstarch and juice together in a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly until mixture boils.
8. Cook for 1 minute more (mixture will be very thick).
9. Remove from heat and stir in raspberries, then cool to room temperature.
10. Fold whipped cream into cooled raspberries and spread over chilled cream cheese layer.
11. Chill for an additional 2 to 3 hours before serving.
